findings.message: Title is 15 chars (target 30-60): 'Sports Schedule'.
findings.fix: Rewrite the <title> to ~30-60 characters so it isn't truncated in search results and still leads with the target keyword.

findings.message: Meta description is 48 chars (target 120-160).
findings.fix: Trim or expand the meta description to ~120-160 characters so it displays fully in the SERP snippet.

findings.message: No structured data (JSON-LD / schema.org) found on the page.
findings.fix: Add relevant JSON-LD schema (e.g. WebPage / SportsEvent / FAQ) to enable rich results and clarify the page to Google.

findings.message: Page has 2 <h1> tags (expected 1).
findings.fix: Keep a single <h1> per page; demote the extra ones to <h2>/<h3> for a clear heading hierarchy.

findings.message: https://totalsportek.tech/dmca is intentionally excluded from Google's index (indexingState=BLOCKED_BY_META_TAG, coverageState=Excluded by ‘noindex’ tag). Expected.
findings.fix: Expected — the page is intentionally noindex (e.g. /dmca). No action needed unless this page should actually rank, in which case remove its noindex meta tag / X-Robots-Tag header.
